project: FactDeMice - Evidence-based Fact-Checking with Fact-consistent translation, Fake Review Detection, and Automatic Misinformative Claim Extraction
title: FactDeMice - Overovani faktu na zaklade textovych dokladu s vyuzitim prekladu konzistentniho s fakty, detekci falesnych recenzi a automaticke extrakce zavadejicich tvrzeni

metadata.agency: Technology Agency of the Czech Republic
metadata.program: 8. verejna soutez programu SIGMA Dilci cil 4: Bilateralni spoluprace

english_title.label: English title
english_title.text: FactDeMice - Evidence-based Fact-Checking with Fact-consistent translation, Fake Review Detection, and Automatic Misinformative Claim Extraction

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: fake news detection; fact checking; contrastive evidence; disinformation; data augmentation; DNN; LLM; OSINT data; propagation behavior; social media; machine translation; information retrieval; multilingual; Czech; English; Chinese

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: (1) Fake Review Dataset Collection & Detection Tools M: Part of deliverable 3.1, performance on test set (from WP2.1). WP2.1: [M1~M12] WP3.1: [M7~M21] (2) Disinformation Campaign Detection Methods M: Part of deliverable 3.1, performance on test set (from WP2.2). WP2.2: [M13~M24] WP3.2: [M13~M30] (3) Automatic Claim Extraction from News Comments M: Part of deliverable 3.1, performance on test set (from WP2.3). WP2.3: [M7~M18] WP3.3: [M16~M33] (4) Evidence-Based Claim Analysis Tools M: Part of deliverable 3.1, performance on test set (from WP2.3). WP2.3: [M7~M18] WP3.3: [M16~M33] (5) Factually Consistent Language Translation M: Part of deliverable 3.2, performance on test set (from WP2.3). WP2.3: [M7~M18] WP3.4: [M25~M36]

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Fajcik Martin, Ing., Ph.D. (DCGM) – research leader Jarolim Antonin, Ing. (DCGM) Makaiova Lucia, Bc. (DCGM) Rysanek Jakub, Bc. (DCGM) Smrz Pavel, doc. RNDr., Ph.D. (DCGM)
